ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district where the account is located */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of account (e.g., checking, savings, credit) */,
  "statement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of account statements (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "account_age" INTEGER /* Age of the account in years */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, closed) */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit of the account (for credit accounts) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_holders" (
  "account_holder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account holder */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the holder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the account holder */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the account holder */,
  "income" REAL /* Income of the account holder */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the account holder */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the account holder */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the account holder */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the account holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_holder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_holders_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., deposit, withdrawal, transfer) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statement */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the statement */,
  "statement_date" TEXT /* Date when the statement was generated */,
  "statement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the statement (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount due on the statement */,
  "minimum_payment" REAL /* Minimum payment required on the statement */,
  "payment_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statements_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bank_employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee (e.g., customer service, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department where the employee works */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch where the employee works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bank_employees_branch_id FOREIGN KEY ("branch_id") REFERENCES branches ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the branch */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account being accessed */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee accessing the account */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES bank_employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., USD, EUR, JPY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_currencies" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the currency associated with the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id", "currency_id")
)
